prompt: Stunningly beautiful {argument name="subject" default="woman"} with a {argument name="vibe" default="cool, aloof atmospheric vibe"}, exquisite and refined facial features, cold and glamorous high-end face, long flowing hair, graceful and alluring figure, (character features completely locked and consistent) Scene: Indoor space with mirrors (bathroom or mirrored wall), multiple reflections, layered depth in the space Pose: Standing in front of the mirror, one hand lightly touching the mirror surface or resting on the countertop, body slightly angled, head gently turned toward the camera Expression: Calm and emotionless, with a hint of cold indifference and detachment Camera angle: Low angle or slight side angle shot, with the mirror reflection clearly visible in the frame Lighting: Cool white light as the main source, with localized shadows, emphasizing structural contours and three-dimensionality Style: High-end fashion editorial, subtle film grain, low contrast Details: Delicately realistic skin texture, clear yet softly layered and slightly blurred mirror reflections Atmosphere: Restrained, rational, distant, with a touch of surreal unreality Quality: Ultra-sharp 8K, extreme details, cinematic lighting and shadows, beautiful depth-of-field bokeh
translatedPrompt: 绝美 {argument name="subject" default="女性"}，带有 {argument name="vibe" default="冷淡、疏离的氛围感"}，五官精致细腻，冷艳高级脸，长发飘逸，身姿优雅迷人，（角色特征完全锁定且一致） 场景：室内镜面空间（浴室或镜面墙），多重反射，空间层次感深邃 姿势：站在镜子前，一只手轻触镜面或放在台面上，身体微侧，头部轻微转向镜头 表情：冷静无表情，带有一丝冷漠与疏离感 拍摄角度：低角度或微侧角拍摄，镜中反射在画面中清晰可见 光影：冷白光为主光源，局部阴影，强调结构轮廓与立体感 风格：高端时尚杂志大片，细腻的胶片颗粒感，低对比度 细节：细腻逼真的皮肤纹理，清晰但层次柔和且略带模糊的镜面反射 氛围：克制、理性、疏离，带有一丝超现实的虚幻感 画质：超高清 8K，极致细节，电影级光影，唯美的景深虚化效果

breakdown.creativeCore: 氛围感冷艳镜面人像：一个高度精细的时尚杂志大片提示词，用于在具有复杂光影和反射的镜面空间中拍摄女性人像。
breakdown.subject: 人物
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 游戏角色、IP 形象、Cosplay、职业角色设定

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: layered]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, cinematic, editorial]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: low contrast, film grain, camera]。

Text requirements:
包含文字或排版元素。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
